info.title: Old Whale API
info.description:
HTTP JSON API for Old Whale: registration, login (JWT), current user, and admin user management.

**Storage:** PostgreSQL only; the server requires a configured **`DATABASE_URL`** (no embedded SQLite).

**Authentication:** Send `Authorization: Bearer <token>` for protected routes. Admin routes require a JWT whose payload includes `role: "admin"`.

**JWT payload (HS256):** Claims include `uid` (int64 user id), `role` (`user` or `admin`), plus standard `iat` / `exp`. Default token lifetime is **72 hours** unless the server is configured otherwise.

**Discovery:** Same spec is served as **`GET /openapi.yaml`** (YAML) and **`GET /openapi.json`** (JSON). Interactive docs: **`GET /swagger`** (Swagger UI).

**CORS:** When `CORS_ORIGIN` is unset, responses use `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`. Preflight `OPTIONS` returns **204** with CORS headers for allowed methods (`GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `PATCH`, `DELETE`). Allowed request header: `Authorization`, `Content-Type`.

get.description: Returns OK when the database connection pool answers `Ping()`. Does not require authentication.

post.description: Creates a user with role `user` and returns a JWT plus public user fields.

400.description: Invalid JSON, invalid fields (login length, password length, email), or validation failed

post.description: Authenticates by login name and password; returns a JWT and public user fields.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's public profile. Requires a valid Bearer JWT.

401.description: Missing or invalid token, user not found, or account disabled

post.description: Requires Bearer JWT with **admin** role. Password minimum length is **4** (intended for test accounts). Unknown `role` values default to `user`.

patch.description: Requires Bearer JWT with **admin** role. At least one of `disabled` or `role` should be sent; empty `role` string is ignored.

400.description: Bad path id, invalid JSON, or invalid payload

delete.description:
Requires Bearer JWT with **admin** role. Cannot delete your own account.

**Note:** The implementation returns **204** with an empty body when the SQL `DELETE` succeeds, including when no row matched the id (no separate **404**).

400.description: Bad path id, or cannot delete self

post.summary: Look up process environment variable (admin diagnostic)
post.description: Returns whether the given name is set in the API process environment and its value if set. Requires admin JWT.

get.description: Returns backend-owned provider labels and default models URLs for the admin importer.

post.summary: Import provider models into an AI group
post.description: Looks up the supplied API-key environment variable, requests the selected provider models URL server-side, parses returned model IDs, and upserts them as group variants.
Public stub; optional Bearer associates user for audit logs.

parameters.name: editor_mode
parameters.description: Exact match on stored editor mode

BearerAuth.description:
JWT returned by `POST /api/auth/login` or `POST /api/auth/register` (HS256).
Payload includes `uid` (user id), `role`, and registered `iat` / `exp` claims.

PatchUserRequest.description: At least one field is typically sent.

name.description: Environment variable name (letters, digits, underscore; max 256)

envVarName.description: Environment variable name whose value is used as the provider API key.
